title: The Wild Boar and the Fox
lines: A Wild Boar was sharpening his tusks on a stone when a Fox asked him why.
'Why waste time sharpening your tusks?" asked the Fox.
'I see no hunters coming, and the danger is not immediate.'
'That is exactly why I sharpen them now," replied the Boar.
'When danger comes, there will be no time to prepare.'
moral: Preparation in times of peace prevents disaster in times of crisis.
